# dokku_mariadb_service_link (Resource)

Links a Dokku MariaDB service to an application and injects its connection details into the application's environment.

## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The Dokku application name.
- `service` (String) The MariaDB service name.

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Alternative environment variable name for the connection credentials.
- `query_string` (String) Additional parameters appended to the database URL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The resource ID.

## Import

Import an existing link using `<service>/<app>`:

```shell
terraform import dokku_mariadb_service_link.example database/application
```
